expectations.evidence: AppShell with header and navbar props

expectations.text: Uses separate mobile/desktop Burger toggles with hiddenFrom/visibleFrom
expectations.evidence: Two Burger components with hiddenFrom and visibleFrom props
NavLink used for all nav items

expectations.text: AppShell navbar has breakpoint and collapsed props
expectations.evidence: navbar={{ width: 260, breakpoint: 'sm', collapsed: { mobile: !mobileOpened, desktop: !desktopOpened } }}

expectations.text: Does not use hardcoded pixel values for layout
expectations.evidence: Uses inline style={{ borderRadius: 6 }} on NavLink and padding: '1.5rem' on metric cards
